events.title: Beauty Way — Liquid Bloom & Temple Step
events.description: Beauty Way Productions and The Yoga Barn co-present Ubud's premier intentional dance gathering for June 2026, featuring internationally recognised producers Liquid Bloom and Temple Step. The evening opens with a cacao ceremony at 7 PM — ceremonial cacao provided by Ubud Raw Cacao — before diving into a live set by ACHARYA & NRYN blending deep future-tribal beats with world instruments during the sunset hour, followed by the headline sets from Temple Step and Liquid Bloom. A tea lounge with ceremonial tea service runs throughout. This is a produced, intention-held event — not a rave.
events.short_description: Liquid Bloom and Temple Step headline this cacao ceremony and intentional dance night at the Yoga Barn — a produced gathering, not a party.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Pengosekan, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali 80571
events.price_info: IDR 450,000 super early bird / IDR 550,000 early bird / IDR 650,000 presale / IDR 850,000 door

events.title: Full Moon Blue Moon Cacao Ceremony with Raio
events.description: Rob Weber — known in Ubud as Raio — is a musician, medicine man, and sound healer whose full moon ceremonies at the Yoga Barn have become a community anchor. Each ceremony opens with ceremonial-grade cacao, breathwork, and heart-opening intention setting before flowing into live medicine music and ecstatic movement, closing with sound healing. May 31 is a rare Blue Moon — the second full moon in a calendar month — adding an extra layer of ceremonial significance to this gathering.
events.short_description: Blue Moon cacao ceremony with Ubud's Raio (Rob Weber) — medicine music, breathwork, and sound healing on the rare Blue Moon of May 31.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Pengosekan, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali 80571

events.title: Friday Ecstatic Dance — The Yoga Barn
events.description: The Yoga Barn's Friday night ecstatic dance is an adults-only conscious movement gathering. Held in the main shala, the session runs as a continuous arc from opening warm-up through peak rhythms and into closing integration — guided by DJs known for weaving global beats, world instruments, and ceremonial sound. The upper-level DJ booth sells out in advance; the lower studio offers walk-in access. No phones, no shoes, no talking on the floor.
events.short_description: Adults-only Friday ecstatic dance at the Yoga Barn, guided by international DJs in a ceremonial container.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Pengosekan, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali 80571

events.title: Vibración~ Ecstatic Dance — Thursdays at Paradiso
events.description: Every Thursday, Paradiso Ubud's open-air garden transforms into one of Bali's longest-running ecstatic dance floors. Vibración~ is a full-power conscious dance journey held in the beautiful tropical setting of Paradiso — Ubud's organic vegan cultural centre. Experienced international DJs guide the arc through building waves of rhythm into expansive free dance, honouring the container of ecstatic movement. No talking on the dancefloor. No phones. No shoes.
events.short_description: Long-running Thursday ecstatic dance night at Paradiso Ubud — full-power conscious dance with international DJs.
events.venue_address: Jl. Goutama Selatan, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali 80571

events.title: Dance of the Dragonfly — Sunset Somatic
events.description: A weekly Wednesday somatic movement ritual set in an open-air wooden shala overlooking one of Ubud's most beautiful rice field walks. Led by Ritual Beats and Emmalee Bevan, the session opens with somatic warm-up and flows into free dance, closing with a fire circle open to all dancers. Optional herbal steam sauna and salt water pool available post-dance (6–9 PM). No experience needed. The format is grounded in somatic movement practice — embodied, unhurried, rooted in the landscape.
events.short_description: Weekly Wednesday somatic dance in a rice-field shala at Dragonfly Village, with optional fire circle and steam sauna.
events.price_info: IDR 150,000 (local KITAS) / IDR 200,000 (visitors). Optional sauna + pool + fire circle +80,000.

events.title: RISE Ecstatic Dance
events.description: RISE is a weekly ecstatic dance held every Tuesday evening at Alchemy Yoga & Meditation Center in Ubud. The format moves through a guided warm-up, free dance guided by an experienced DJ across varied movement modalities — yoga, contact improvisation, capoeira, hip hop, acroyoga — and closes with a community circle and live acoustic sound healing. Each session is led by a different facilitator, keeping the energy fresh. The dance floor is held as a safe, intentional space with no phones and no shoes.
events.short_description: Weekly Tuesday ecstatic dance with warm-up, free dance and sound healing close at AYMC Ubud.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan, Sayan, Kecamatan Ubud, Sayan, Ubud 80571, Bali
